description: The demo PR. Hardcoded TTL (TD-001/TD-006), hardcoded max_attempts=5 (TD-002), missing 64-char key validation (criterion 3), missing expired-key test (criterion 6).

input.pr_title: feat: Add idempotency key support — Fixes #15

mock_fixtures.pr_diff:
--- a/src/payment_processor.py
+++ b/src/payment_processor.py
@@ +18 @@
+        self._idempotency_ttl = 86400
@@ +45 @@
+        max_attempts = 5
@@ +31 @@
+        if not key:
+            raise IdempotencyException(error_code='INVALID_KEY', user_message='Key must not be empty.')
mock_fixtures.issue_body:
## Acceptance Criteria
1. Every payment request must accept an `idempotency_key` string parameter
2. Duplicate requests with same key within TTL window must return cached response
3. `idempotency_key` must be validated — non-empty string, maximum 64 characters
4. Cache TTL must be configurable via Config (not hardcoded)
5. If no key provided, generate UUID automatically
6. Unit tests must cover: duplicate key returns same result, key over 64 chars rejected, expired key allows re-processing

team_decisions.description: All configurable values must come from config.py. Hardcoded values are a merge blocker.
Maximum retry attempts is 3 via Config.RETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS. Any other value is a merge blocker.
Idempotency cache TTL must come from Config.IDEMPOTENCY_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS. Never hardcode 86400.

comments: Hardcoded timeout = 30 here will cause issues in staging. Move to Config.
Fixed — all values now in Config class.
Approving. Team rule — no hardcoded values in src/. Adding as TD-001.
Load testing showed 5 caused thundering herd. 3 with backoff is correct.
